ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first started using the service */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for customer rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who scheduled the appointment */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being provided */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned to the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  "preferred_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred technician */,
  "preferred_date_time" TEXT /* Preferred date and time for the appointment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES appointment_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the service in minutes */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the service details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or skill set of the technician */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the technician was hired */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the technician based on customer feedback */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the technician (e.g., available, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_personnel" (
  "admin_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative personnel */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrative personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrative personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrative personnel */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrative personnel */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the administrative personnel was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technician_personnel" (
  "tech_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician personnel */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician personnel */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the technician personnel */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the technician personnel was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_history_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES appointment_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment for which feedback is provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technician_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician */,
  "available_date" TEXT /* Date the technician is available */,
  "available_time" TEXT /* Time the technician is available */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technician_availability_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment for which the invoice is generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due for the service */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)
